goal: Validate the AX650 Home Assistant voice stack on an AX650 board and fix blockers discovered during board validation.
stack: Python adapters plus Docker Compose and AXERA C++ server wrappers

requirement_alignment.goal: Continue after merged PR #5 until AX650 board validation succeeds or the next concrete runtime blocker is fixed and documented.
non_goals: Do not overwrite unrelated board paths.
expected_behavior: ASR/TTS containers can build or locate upstream AXERA server binaries instead of failing immediately after clone.
Board-side smoke checks can run against fake upstream services and real Wyoming adapters.
constraints_and_risks: Docker Hub access from the board currently resets connections when pulling python:3.11-slim-bookworm.
Real ASR/TTS/LLM model inference still requires model assets and upstream server binaries.
acceptance_checks: Local pytest and docker-compose config pass.
Board-side pytest and docker compose config pass.
Board-side smoke_check reports PASS for ASR/TTS/LLM HTTP surfaces and Wyoming TCP ports in adapter validation mode.
Remaining full-inference blockers are explicit.
requirement_alignment.validation_approach: Run local tests, board-side tests, board-side compose config, and board-side smoke_check on AX650N 10.126.35.158.
requirement_alignment.first_iteration_scope: Add runtime build scripts for ASR/TTS server binaries, optional TTS server arguments, fake upstream services for board validation, and tests for build-on-missing behavior.

issues.title: fix[1]: build AXERA ASR/TTS servers in AX650 containers
acceptance_checks: ASR/TTS build scripts exist and are wired into Dockerfiles/start scripts.
/soc is mounted for AX MSP headers/libs.
TTS optional espeak and jieba arguments are supported.
Local tests pass.
Board-side adapter smoke check passes or next blocker is reported.

issues.title: fix[2]: make AX650 board Docker builds reproducible
acceptance_checks: ASR/TTS Dockerfiles allow mirrorable base image and apt sources.
Board builds can use local vendor source caches instead of cloning GitHub inside the container.
ASR and TTS images build on AX650N.
ASR and TTS upstream server build scripts compile and install asr_server and tts_server against /soc.
Local pytest and compose config pass.
Board pytest, compose config, and adapter smoke checks pass; model-asset blockers remain explicit.

issues.title: fix[3]: harden AX runtime startup on board
acceptance_checks: ASR/TTS startup scripts include /soc/lib and the installed server lib directory in LD_LIBRARY_PATH before starting AX server binaries.
ASR/TTS containers wait long enough for first-start server compilation and model initialization on the board.
Local pytest and compose config pass.
AX650 board ASR real model validation succeeds with a transcription response.

issues.title: fix[4]: complete TTS model assets and readiness
acceptance_checks: TTS model download script installs kokoro axmodels, vocab.txt, and voices/*.bin under models/tts/kokoro.
TTS startup waits for the upstream server TCP port instead of a nonexistent /healthz endpoint.
Default Chinese TTS voice matches upstream server defaults/assets.
Local pytest and compose config pass.
AX650 board TTS real speech request returns a WAV file and Wyoming port becomes reachable.

issues.title: fix[5]: build openWakeWord without Docker Hub image pull
acceptance_checks: openWakeWord builds from local Dockerfile using the mirrorable Python base image.
The container installs wyoming-openwakeword from PyPI and preloads the built-in ok_nabu model.
Compose exposes and health-checks Wyoming TCP port 10400.
Local pytest and compose config pass.
AX650 board openWakeWord container reaches healthy and tcp://127.0.0.1:10400 is reachable.

issues.title: fix[6]: pin wakeword runtime deps for AX650
acceptance_checks: openWakeWord pins numpy below 2 for tflite-runtime 2.14 compatibility.
Local pytest and compose config pass.
AX650 board openWakeWord container rebuilds and reaches healthy.
ASR, TTS, and wakeword Wyoming TCP ports are reachable on the board.

rounds.implementation_summary: Added ASR/TTS runtime build scripts, build-if-missing startup behavior, /soc mounts, TTS optional server paths, fake upstream services, and tests for build-on-missing behavior.

validation.evidence: 14 passed, 1 warning
Compose parsed successfully

validation.command: board python3 -m pytest -q && docker compose config
validation.evidence: 14 passed on AX650N 10.126.35.158 after patch transfer
All ASR/TTS/LLM HTTP and Wyoming TCP checks PASS using fake upstream HTTP services plus real ASR/TTS Wyoming adapters
Docker Hub metadata request for python:3.11-slim-bookworm reset by peer

rounds.test_summary: Local validation passed; board-side adapter smoke validation passed. Full Docker image build is blocked by Docker Hub connectivity from the board, and real inference still needs model assets/upstream server binaries.
rounds.commit: HEAD commit for iteration 1; final hash reported by git/PR
rounds.commit_message: fix(iter-1): build AX servers during container startup (#6)

rounds.implementation_summary: Added mirrorable ASR/TTS Docker build args, optional local upstream source caches, pytest testpath scoping, Python-selectable model download scripts, and AX650-native upstream build patches required by /soc libs.

validation.evidence: 14 passed, 1 warning
Compose parsed successfully with mirrored ASR/TTS build args

validation.command: board docker compose build asr && docker compose build tts
validation.evidence: ASR and TTS images rebuilt on AX650N 10.126.35.158 using DaoCloud Python base, USTC apt mirror, and local vendor source caches without nested .git directories; final context sizes were about 15MB for ASR and 169MB for TTS.
Built and installed /opt/ax_asr_api/install/ax650/asr_server against /soc
Built and installed /opt/ax_tts_api/install/ax650/tts_server against /soc

validation.command: board python3 -m pytest -q && docker compose config
validation.evidence: 14 passed on AX650N 10.126.35.158; compose config generated successfully
PASS for ASR/TTS/LLM HTTP surfaces and ASR/TTS/wakeword Wyoming TCP ports using fake upstream services plus real ASR/TTS adapters

validation.command: board find models -maxdepth 4 -type f; du -sh models/asr models/tts models/llm
validation.evidence: models/asr, models/tts, and models/llm contain only .gitkeep files on the board, so full real inference cannot start until model assets are downloaded or provided

rounds.test_command: python -m pytest -q && docker-compose config; board Docker builds/build_server scripts/pytest/compose/smoke_check
rounds.test_summary: Local and board validations passed through ASR/TTS image build, native server compilation, and adapter smoke checks. Full real model inference remains blocked only by absent model artifacts under models/.
rounds.commit_message: fix(iter-2): make AX650 Docker builds reproducible (#8)

rounds.implementation_summary: Added /soc and installed AX server library directories to ASR/TTS runtime LD_LIBRARY_PATH and increased ASR/TTS wait timeouts so first board startup can compile and initialize real services.

validation.command: board docker compose up -d --build asr && docker compose ps asr
validation.evidence: ASR container on AX650N 10.126.35.158 reached Up/healthy with the real sensevoice model.

validation.command: board docker compose exec -T asr curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/healthz
validation.evidence: {"auth_enabled":false,"status":"ok"}

validation.command: board docker compose exec -T asr curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/models
validation.evidence: ASR server returned its model list.

validation.command: board docker compose exec -T asr curl -fsS http://127.0.0.1:8080/v1/audio/transcriptions -F file=@/opt/ax_asr_api/demo.wav -F model=sensevoice -F language=zh -F response_format=json
validation.evidence: {"text":"甚至出现交易几乎停滞的情况。"}
14 passed, 1 warning
Compose parsed successfully with 300s ASR/TTS wait timeout settings.

rounds.test_summary: Local validation passed and board ASR real inference returned a Chinese transcription from the sensevoice model.
rounds.commit_message: fix(iter-3): harden AX runtime startup on board (#9)

rounds.implementation_summary: Completed kokoro TTS model asset download, switched TTS startup readiness to the upstream server TCP port, and changed the default Chinese voice to zf_xiaoxiao.

validation.evidence: 14 passed, 1 warning
Compose parsed successfully with TTS voice zf_xiaoxiao.

validation.command: board HF_ENDPOINT=https://hf-mirror.com hf download AXERA-TECH/kokoro.axera --include cpp/dict/vocab.txt --include cpp/voices/*.bin
validation.evidence: Downloaded 55 kokoro asset files; models/tts/kokoro/vocab.txt and voices/zf_xiaoxiao.bin are present.

validation.command: board docker compose up -d --build tts && docker compose ps tts
validation.evidence: TTS container on AX650N 10.126.35.158 reached Up/healthy and published tcp://127.0.0.1:10200.

validation.command: board docker compose exec -T tts curl -fsS -o /tmp/out.wav -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{...}' http://127.0.0.1:8081/v1/audio/speech
validation.evidence: Real TTS request returned /tmp/out.wav, 23K, using kokoro zh voice zf_xiaoxiao.
PASS for ASR Wyoming 10300 and TTS Wyoming 10200. Host-side ASR/TTS HTTP checks fail because compose exposes only Wyoming ports; wakeword and LLM are not started yet.

rounds.test_command: python -m pytest -q && docker-compose config; board TTS real speech and Wyoming TCP checks
rounds.test_summary: Local validation passed and board real TTS speech generation returned a WAV file; ASR/TTS Wyoming ports are reachable. Wakeword and LLM real validation remain.
rounds.commit_message: fix(iter-4): complete TTS model assets and readiness (#10)

rounds.implementation_summary: Replaced the direct rhasspy/wyoming-openwakeword Docker Hub image pull with a local wakeword image build that installs wyoming-openwakeword from PyPI and preloads ok_nabu.

validation.evidence: 16 passed, 1 warning
Compose parsed successfully and openWakeWord uses wakeword/Dockerfile instead of rhasspy/wyoming-openwakeword.
Built openWakeWord on AX650N 10.126.35.158 using DaoCloud Python base, USTC apt mirror, and PyPI packages. A follow-up pin is required because tflite-runtime 2.14 is not compatible with numpy 2.x.

validation.command: board docker compose ps openwakeword; tcp connect 127.0.0.1:10400
validation.evidence: openWakeWord container reached Up/healthy and tcp://127.0.0.1:10400 was reachable.

rounds.test_command: python -m pytest -q && docker-compose config; board openWakeWord build and TCP health check
rounds.test_summary: Local validation passed and board openWakeWord real container is healthy on Wyoming port 10400. LLM real validation remains.
rounds.commit_message: fix(iter-5): build openWakeWord without Docker Hub image pull (#11)

rounds.implementation_summary: Pinned wakeword numpy to <2 so tflite-runtime 2.14 can load its native extension on AX650/aarch64.

validation.evidence: 15 passed, 1 warning
Compose parsed successfully.

validation.command: board docker compose rm -sf openwakeword && docker compose up -d --build openwakeword
validation.evidence: Rebuilt openWakeWord on AX650N 10.126.35.158 with numpy 1.26.4, tflite-runtime 2.14.0, and wyoming-openwakeword 1.8.2.

validation.command: board docker compose ps asr tts openwakeword
validation.evidence: ASR, TTS, and openWakeWord containers are Up/healthy on Wyoming ports 10300, 10200, and 10400.
PASS for ASR, TTS, and wakeword Wyoming TCP ports; HTTP host checks and LLM remain outside this wakeword fix.

rounds.test_command: python -m pytest -q && docker-compose config; board openWakeWord rebuild and TCP health check
rounds.test_summary: Local validation passed and board openWakeWord is healthy with numpy<2. LLM real validation remains.
rounds.commit_message: fix(iter-6): pin wakeword runtime deps for AX650 (#12)

assumptions: Password authentication with the approved default password was used via sshpass.
Remote work was moved from /tmp to /root/ax650-home-assistant-board-validation because /tmp is tmpfs and filled during model download.
AGENTS.md and plan.md are pre-existing local files and are not staged.
Vendor source caches under vendor/ax_asr_api and vendor/ax_tts_api are local ignored build inputs; only .gitkeep placeholders are committed.
ASR real inference, TTS real speech generation, and openWakeWord Wyoming service are validated; LLM real service validation is still in progress.
